title: Final Report
text:
1. Introduction
Background on the topic and data. State the research question(s) / hypothesis(es). Narrative of the topic and why it matters.

title: Final Report
text:
2. Methods

2.1 Data source
TBD — where the data came from, how it was obtained, the time window, the size of the dataset.


2.2 Data cleaning and wrangling
TBD — missing values, type conversions, derived variables, filtering rules.


2.3 Exploratory tools
TBD — summary statistics, static plots, interactive plots (see the Interactive Viz page).


2.4 Modeling
TBD — chosen course-covered method (XGBoost / Random Forest / GAM / LDA). Feature engineering. Train/validation/test split. Hyperparameters. Metrics reported (R², RMSE, MAE, ROC/AUC, …).
